title: Bare Bones x Capybara Totem
description: Change your vanilla totem into a Capybara-themed totem! ✨
body:
CAPYBARA TOTEM💙

Change your vanilla totem into a Capybara-themed totem! ✨

![In Game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c0ec36a3c12823533676740e4acb8a02e82edc83_0.webp)

Part of the Capybara War set! 👑

- Recommended to bundle with the [Bare Bones](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones) Texturepack for a better experience!
